markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reset the Metronome/growthx.ai partnership and align on future content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **White Paper Project:** The initial project's quality issues were a joint failure. Metronome's team was new (\<6 months) and missed its initial review deadlines, while growthx.ai shipped content too quickly.
  - [**Pricing Index Project:** This project demands high accuracy. Inaccurate pricing models would harm Metronome's prospects and customers, making quality paramount.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**New Editorial Lead:** Will is now the editorial lead. Megan will support him, shifting her focus from deep content review to providing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Process Reset:** growthx.ai will reset the editorial process, focusing on deep calibration with Will and sharing its internal content pipeline to build trust and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

## Topics

### White Paper Project Debrief

  - [**Context:** The project launched during a period of significant team flux at Metronome, with most members having less than six months of tenure.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Quality issues stemmed from a joint failure in process.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [**Metronome:** Missed initial review deadlines, preventing early calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [**growthx.ai:** Shipped content too quickly, exacerbating the problem.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The content was rushed and of low quality ("D-grade" per Megan's assessment), but the team prioritized speed to market.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

### Pricing Index Project: A New Standard

  - [**Goal:** Drive real, tangible results for Metronome.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [**Quality Requirement:** Accuracy is non-negotiable.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Inaccurate pricing models would harm Metronome's prospects and customers.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**Scope:** The project includes both data-driven content and editorial sections ("Metronome's take").](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### New Editorial Process & Lead

  - [**Lead:** Will is now the editorial lead, with Megan providing support.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Process Reset:** growthx.ai will implement a new process to ensure quality and build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Deep Calibration:** Work directly with Will to define tone, voice, and quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Pipeline Transparency:** Share internal artifacts (e.g., instruction sets) and explain the content pipeline to build trust and show how feedback is used.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Copy-First Review:** Deliver full copy, not just outlines, to enable review of the final product.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Benchmark:** growthx.ai cited a client with a 4-layer review process (MD, ND, lawyer, co-founder) that, after initial calibration, now receives high-quality content with 70-80% engagement rates.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Begin deep calibration with Will on the Pricing Index project.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Share internal content pipeline artifacts (e.g., instruction sets) with Will.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Metronome:**](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [Will to drive the editorial process for the Pricing Index.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [Megan to support Will and provide high-level guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [Continue regular syncs with Megan and Will.](https://fathom.video/share/GHitSyYedZ-Ztri4Lo7Lr4p8LX8vvZ_u?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
